TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jesse_Branson, title = Jesse_Branson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jesse_Branson} }

S.FORM: Jesse Branson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1942 , ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 1, Jesse Branson, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2014) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jesse Branson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1942 , ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 1, Jesse Branson, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2014) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *es~ɕs~ɕe βrans~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *es~ɕs~ɕe βrans~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
